testCases.requirement: 1 | Consent: 1. One standard consent title, content & acknowledgement text for all ETB Onboarding (incl CASA & CC, with or without M2U ID). 2. When tap on "I agree & consent" button, consent will be "cached" on version binding with device ID, but will only be saved and stored upon successful S2U setup. - Stored consent will be one data entry per document, single tick mark covers multiple documents (e.g., one tick mark for 4 documents results in 4 stored entries, each tagged with its version and type). | MCM 1. Temporary store customer consent (by doc entry)
testCases.objective: Verify 1 | consent: 1. one standard consent title, content & acknowledgement text for all etb onboarding (incl casa & cc, with or without m2u id). 2. when tap on "i agree & consent" button, consent will be "cached" on version binding with device id, but will only be saved and stored upon successful s2u setup. - stored consent will be one data entry per document, single tick mark covers multiple documents (e.g., one tick mark for 4 documents results in 4 stored entries, each tagged with its version and type). | mcm 1. temporary store customer consent (by doc entry)
steps: Prepare test data and environment

testCases.requirement: 2 | Drop-off: 1. If user drops off after SMS OTP but before S2U setup/verification, on re-launch they will be redirected to the Onboarding Landing screen, followed by the Consent screen. 2. If user drops off after completing S2U verification, Consent screen will be bypassed and user will be redirected directly to the [App Dashboard] - Pre-Login screen.
testCases.objective: Verify 2 | drop-off: 1. if user drops off after sms otp but before s2u setup/verification, on re-launch they will be redirected to the onboarding landing screen, followed by the consent screen. 2. if user drops off after completing s2u verification, consent screen will be bypassed and user will be redirected directly to the [app dashboard] - pre-login screen.
steps: Prepare test data and environment

Perform user action in UI for requirement: 2 | Drop-off: 1. If user drops off after SMS OTP but before S2U setup/verification, on re-launch they will be redirected to the Onboarding Landing screen, followed by the Consent screen. 2. If user drops off after completing S2U verification, Consent screen will be bypassed and user will be redirected directly to the [App Dashboard] - Pre-Login screen.
Validate expected behavior using ui assertions
testCases.expectedResult: System satisfies requirement: 2 | Drop-off: 1. If user drops off after SMS OTP but before S2U setup/verification, on re-launch they will be redirected to the Onboarding Landing screen, followed by the Consent screen. 2.
